content: WhatsApp actively detects and bans whatsmeow unofficial clients. whatsmeow issue #810 (OPEN, May 2025): 'Your account may be at risk' warning triggered even for non-bulk-messaging clients, accounts banned with legitimate low-volume usage. Affects both WhatsMeow and Baileys regardless of safeguards. Issue #561: forced 403 logout 'You have been logged out for using an unofficial app', session deleted server-side. Meta Verified on business accounts reportedly stops warnings. Detection targets the library itself, not just usage patterns.
